description:
Admit an existing patient to a ward in Care2x Hospital Information System.

First, log in to Care2x using credentials: admin / care2x_admin
Then search for the patient named 'James Smith' (already registered in the system).
Admit this patient with:
- Department: Internal Medicine

To access the Admission module, expand the Menu tree in the left navigation and click 'Admission'.

URL: http://localhost/
